message:
perf(ansi): Eliminate heap allocations in hot paths

Optimizations:
- set_attributes(): Replace Vec with stack array [&str; 7]
- write_attributes(): Replace Vec/join with stack array [&str; 8]
- write_fg_color_with_mode(): Replace write! macro with direct byte writes
- write_bg_color_with_mode(): Replace write! macro with direct byte writes
- Add write_u8_decimal() helper for zero-alloc integer formatting

Benchmark results (before → after):
- ansi_simple_text: 338ns → 253ns (25% faster)
- ansi_styled_multiline: 3.7µs → 2.2µs (40% faster)
- ansi_cell_by_cell_80x24: 425µs → 305µs (28% faster)

Isomorphism proof:
- Ordering preserved: Yes - same SGR code order
- Output identical: Yes - exact same ANSI sequences
- All tests pass: Yes - including snapshot tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
